cn.description:
Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best.

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

cn.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com
这是一款以《英雄无敌》玩法为游戏原型，战斗参考了《英雄之时》采用快节奏的自走棋模式的单局存档式回合制策略游戏。游戏以《帝国时代》为游戏背景，游戏内拥有多个种族，每个种族以各个国家的文明特点作为种族风格，如法兰西、华夏、古罗马，等。美术风格采用Q版像素呈现。玩家在单局游戏内，发展家园、培养英雄、建立部队、探索地图，结合各种策略，击败所有对手，获得最终胜利。

透過此應用程序，您可以有效率且個人化地自動撥打您想要的號碼。您可以定義重複次數、通話間隔、新增分機號碼、撥號前啟動震動，甚至使用內建行事曆安排通話。 「自動重撥應用程式」還提供簡單直覺的介面、詳細的通話記錄和多種自訂選項，以滿足您的需求。

此應用程式非常適合需要自動重複撥打電話的任何人 - 例如預約電話、忙線重試或聯絡線路繁忙的服務。

主要特點：
- 自動重撥佔線或未接來電。
- 設定重試次數和時間間隔。
- 透過行事曆提前安排通話。
- 撥號後自動新增分機號碼。
- 每次重撥前啟用振動。
- 通話記錄和重試統計。

適合：
- 預約（醫生、大使館等）
- 客戶服務或技術支援
- 致電公共辦公室
- 自由工作者和企業主跟進客戶

無論您是打電話預約醫生、聯繫客戶服務，還是在線路繁忙時嘗試連接，此應用程式都可以節省時間和避免煩惱。

advisories: 頻繁/極度的暴力卡通或幻想
hk.description:
發現並征服整個太空深處的無限世界。揭開一個充滿挑戰與威脅的故事，它將帶領你踏上一趟跨越銀河的非凡旅程。


在太空深處沒有什麼能長久不變，和平當然也不例外！
歡迎遊玩《Iron Marines: Invasion!》

暢玩刺激新世界中的獨特關卡任務和特殊行動，每個世界都有自己的特別地形、玩法、敵人和條件。學習如何一一擊敗他們！

在諸方英雄與各種單位的協助下指揮聯邦遍及整個銀河的部隊，他們將讓你的即時戰略遊戲技巧發揮到極限。

在有趣震撼的任務中與不尋常的敵人和兇猛的外星生物作戰。規劃你的戰略來保衛銀河系的和平！

獻給所有喜歡單機即時戰略遊戲和戰略遊戲的《Iron Marines》和科幻動作遊戲粉絲。藉由帶領自己的軍隊執行刺激驚奇的任務來實現你的戰術專家使命。

入侵已經近在眉睫！
率領銀河各地最勇猛的戰鬥部隊。與聯邦最強大的海軍陸戰隊並肩作戰！

現在你可以組合你的小隊並利用每個單位的獨特戰鬥技能：從騎兵到狙擊手、機甲、導彈發射器或可怕的外星戰士部落。
訓練出驚異的英雄及其各種實用能力：從提高軍隊士氣和火力到提高他們的耐力和射程，或者在敵人攻擊你之前就能夠感知。幫助他們加入戰鬥，維護各世界的和平！

成為銀河系最大謎團的專家！
使用遊戲內的百科全書來了解你要探索的世界或辨認你面對的敵人。利用可用的戰術資訊來配置您的戰略遊戲計劃。

瞧瞧這款即時戰略太空遠征遊戲的所有驚人特色：

- 一整個銀河等你探索。
- 超過 25 個戰役任務將帶你前往許多最不可思議的世界。規劃緊密的戰略遊戲計畫，有大量的星球等你探索和防衛！
- 75+ 項特殊行動供你提升你的海洋行軍能力到巔峰水準。
- 10 大單位群組，共 24 支不同部隊。你甚至可以根據計劃要部署的任務和策略來組合後備部隊。
- 9 位各具強勁技能待你訓練的威猛英雄。幫助他們成為銀河系的佼佼者！
- 8 種特殊武器可助你在星際間揮灑軍隊戰術！設定你的遊戲計劃並利用彈跳器、毒氣炸彈甚至無人機工廠等即時武器帶來的優勢。
- 40 次升級以供提升你的戰略，並使用防禦無人機、凝固汽油彈火箭、彈跳爆破等增強你的各種單位。
- 超過 20 項成就，讓你證明你成為了一名多高明的即時戰略專家！

選擇您的難度模式以獲得最佳的即時戰略遊戲體驗：休閒、普通或老手。而且，如果你認為玩遍了整個銀河……還有不可能模式可供選擇，這僅適用於精英玩家，可離線使用！

在每日挑戰中證明自己並收集驚人的獎勵。

離線玩即時戰略遊戲：探索令人難以置信的世界，隨時隨地享受精彩的即時戰略體驗。

《Iron Marines Invasion》將在這款史詩即時戰略太空遠征中帶給你數小時豐富多采多姿的有趣遊戲，亦提供即時戰略單機遊戲。

hk.description:
--

獲獎：
● 日本 2021 BitSummit THE 8th BIT | 官方入選
● 韓國 2020 釜山獨立遊戲節 (BIC Fest) | 最佳休閒獎
● 台灣 2020 巴哈姆特 ACG 創作大賽 | 銅賞

關於此遊戲：
《地城謎蹤》是一款考驗玩家 2D 空間邏輯和技能運用的解謎遊戲，你可以用劍打倒身旁的怪物、用弓箭攻擊遠處的敵人、用盾牌推動障礙物、甚至可以用手套拉動怪物改變他的位置。

此遊戲總共有 150 個精心設計的關卡，玩家必須要充分了解遊戲的機制才能順利過關。

而若要達成進階目標，則需要針對解法進行最佳化，有的時候甚至要拋棄原本的解法，重新以不同角度去觀察和思考才能達成。

遊戲特色：
● 地城+解謎+倉庫番
● 150 個精心設計的關卡
● 地城氛圍的像素美術
● 非線性地城地圖

--

● 在 Twitter 上追蹤我們
https://twitter.com/nekolyst
● 在 Facebook 上幫我們點讚
https://www.facebook.com/Nekolyst
● 加入我們的 Discord 群組
https://discord.gg/A7Sss9d

hk.description:
"""你是否知道“Schadenfreude”是德语单词，意思是幸灾乐祸？这也是构建《邻居地狱归来》的主要思想。整个电视节目基于对你的脾气暴躁的邻居进行越来越残酷的恶作剧，以使观众开心，收视率高。在受2000年代早期邪恶电视启发的闹剧盛会中变坏很不错！ 

作为《邻居地狱归来》的睚眦必报的主角伍迪，你将穿越虚构但恰如其名的电视节目的第1季和第2季。一路上对讨厌的邻居进行恶作剧，一直到中国、印度、墨西哥，你将确保他的假期成为活生生的地狱。当你在进行恶作剧时，为什么只瞄准邻居呢？你可以让他的母亲和其他旅伴牵涉其中。无论你决定做什么，你值得信赖的摄制组都会在那里，并时刻关注所有行动。你可以让自己狂放的创造力自由驰骋，并观看邻居在绝望中愤怒。请注意不要被他或他的同伴抓住，否则他们会大声呼叫，并且你的电视节目将被停播。另一方面，如果你表现良好，则通过在邻居的生活中造成越来越多的混乱，收视率将会提高，你可能会赢得声名远播的奖项。 ""

邻居地狱归来1和2在一个包中进行重制：28个剧集，以邻居家中、邮轮上以及世界各地几个不同的度假地点为背景

- 在全高清中新渲染的所有图形
- 所有动画的帧率翻倍，带来更流畅的体验
- 使用隐身、技巧和风格进行完美的伏击
- 使用简单的界面和控件
- 精湛的卡通风格图形
- 大乐队配乐 


© HandyGames

hk.description:
《展翅翱翔》是一款屢獲殊榮的鳥類主題策略卡牌遊戲，也是一部鮮活的交互式鳥類百科，清新有趣，輕鬆愉快，適合1-5名玩家。作為鳥類發燒友，你的目標是發現和吸引更多的鳥兒加入你的自然保護區。

《展翅翱翔》（Wingspan）官方授權電子版改編，曾榮獲2019年德國年度桌面遊戲獎，權威桌遊網站BBG家庭類桌遊位列世界第一。

你們是一群鳥類發燒友——研究員、鳥類觀察家、鳥類學家和收藏家——你們一直在尋覓並試圖吸引那些最美麗的鳥類棲息到自己的野生動物保護區來。每一種鳥的加入都會讓你其中一塊棲息地上的鳥類組合變得更為豐富多彩。每一塊棲息地都各自專注於保護區生態搭建的某一重要方面。

本遊戲中，1-5名玩家在有限的回合內構建他們的自然保護區，並與其他玩家競爭。每當新的鳥類加入自然保護區，都會提升保護區在某個方面的能力，諸如鳥類產蛋、抽取新的鳥類卡牌或者收集食物。遊戲中包含170種獨特的鳥類，它們各自擁有對應它們在自然世界中所有的專長或者偏好的技能：例如，老鷹會捕獵，鵜鶘會捕魚，白鵝喜歡群居。

遊戲特色
* 輕鬆愉快的策略類卡牌遊戲，你的目標是發現和吸引最好的鳥兒。
* 同時支持單人和多人模式，最多可5名玩家組隊暢玩。
* 基於屢獲殊榮的引擎構築桌面遊戲，以卡牌為驅動，富有競爭樂趣。
* 數百隻獨特的鳥兒，配有動畫畫面和真實錄音。
* 用多種方式積攢分數，包括鳥兒、獎勵卡牌和回合目標。

hk.description:
在終極駕駛遊樂場中燃燒橡膠並撕碎金屬！

Wreckfest 充滿了升級和自定義選項。無論您是準備使用加固保險槓、防滾架、側面保護裝置等進行下一次拆遷德比，還是使用空氣濾清器、凸輪軸、燃油系統等發動機性能部件為您的汽車進行一場激烈的比賽，Wreckfest 正在成為最好的競技賽車遊戲。

• 獨特的賽車體驗 –只有通過逼真的物理模擬才能實現。見證在高速賽道上瘋狂的並駕齊驅，在充滿交叉路口和迎面而來的車輛的瘋狂賽道上面臨徹底的破壞瘋狂，或者在德比賽場上大獲全勝。

• 很棒的汽車—— 我們的汽車很舊，被撞壞了，被拼湊在一起......他們散發出風格和個性！從老美國重擊手到敏捷的歐洲人和有趣的亞洲人，你在其他遊戲中找不到這樣的東西。

• 有意義的定制 – 不僅可以改變汽車的外觀，還可以升級它們的防彈衣 – 用重鐵加固它們保護您免受損壞，但也會增加重量，這會影響汽車的操控性。修改您的汽車，以製造堅固的坦克或易碎但閃電般快速的火箭，或介於兩者之間的任何東西！

• 多人遊戲 - 在本地多人遊戲中破壞你的朋友，在追逐爆破優勢的同時將賽車推向極限！

• 挑戰模式 - 與農作物收割機、割草機、校車、三輪車等等一起玩得開心！

• 職業生涯模式 – 爭奪冠軍，賺取經驗，解鎖新的升級和車輛，並成為歷史上的 Wreckfest 冠軍！

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

hk.description:
【婚启 - 让每一份爱都有完美的开始】
婚启是一款专为备婚情侣设计的协同婚礼筹备管理工具，帮助你在一个 App 中，和伴侣一起，集中管理婚礼相关的任务、时间安排、回忆记录和预算信息。

【核心功能】
智能日历规划
• 首页展示婚礼倒计时，重要日期一目了然
• 任务与日历深度联动，筹备进度可视化
• 吉日智能推荐，帮您决策婚礼日期

任务管理系统
• 15大分类任务覆盖婚礼全流程：场地、餐饮、摄影、服饰...
• 根据婚礼日期自动排期，动态调整优先级
• 伴侣任务协同，双方进度实时同步

预算智能管控
• 分类预算设置，支出记录一键添加
• 支持定金、尾款分别记录
• 支出统计复盘，超预算智能预警

回忆时光轴
• 图片视频随心记录，备婚点滴长期保存
• 时间轴浏览模式,甜蜜瞬间时刻回顾
• 仅与伴侣分享，打造专属回忆录

【备婚工具包】

• 座位表：高效的婚礼宴会座位编排，支持座位表导出

【免费功能 vs 婚启会员】
免费用户可使用以下核心功能：
• 恋爱阶段 & 策划阶段备婚任务
• 基础预算管理（使用系统规划的预算分类）

• 筹备阶段 & 确认阶段任务——完整覆盖婚前冲刺与最终确认的全部事项
• 无限支出记录 & 无限礼金记录
• 亲友管理人数无上限
• 座位表无桌数限制，无导出限制
• 自定义任务 & 自定义预算分类
（配对伴侣可共享会员权益）

会员方案：月度订阅 / 季度订阅 / 永久会员（一次性买断）

【订阅与自动续费说明】

• 订阅价格：月度会员为每月9.9元；季度会员为每3个月19.9元

【为什么选择婚启】
• 专为中国备婚情侣设计 - 从选婚期、预算到四大金刚、酒店预定，备婚全流程任务指引

mo.description:
Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best.

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

mo.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

mo.description:
發現並征服整個太空深處的無限世界。揭開一個充滿挑戰與威脅的故事，它將帶領你踏上一趟跨越銀河的非凡旅程。


在太空深處沒有什麼能長久不變，和平當然也不例外！
歡迎遊玩《Iron Marines: Invasion!》

暢玩刺激新世界中的獨特關卡任務和特殊行動，每個世界都有自己的特別地形、玩法、敵人和條件。學習如何一一擊敗他們！

在諸方英雄與各種單位的協助下指揮聯邦遍及整個銀河的部隊，他們將讓你的即時戰略遊戲技巧發揮到極限。

在有趣震撼的任務中與不尋常的敵人和兇猛的外星生物作戰。規劃你的戰略來保衛銀河系的和平！

獻給所有喜歡單機即時戰略遊戲和戰略遊戲的《Iron Marines》和科幻動作遊戲粉絲。藉由帶領自己的軍隊執行刺激驚奇的任務來實現你的戰術專家使命。

入侵已經近在眉睫！
率領銀河各地最勇猛的戰鬥部隊。與聯邦最強大的海軍陸戰隊並肩作戰！

現在你可以組合你的小隊並利用每個單位的獨特戰鬥技能：從騎兵到狙擊手、機甲、導彈發射器或可怕的外星戰士部落。
訓練出驚異的英雄及其各種實用能力：從提高軍隊士氣和火力到提高他們的耐力和射程，或者在敵人攻擊你之前就能夠感知。幫助他們加入戰鬥，維護各世界的和平！

成為銀河系最大謎團的專家！
使用遊戲內的百科全書來了解你要探索的世界或辨認你面對的敵人。利用可用的戰術資訊來配置您的戰略遊戲計劃。

瞧瞧這款即時戰略太空遠征遊戲的所有驚人特色：

- 一整個銀河等你探索。
- 超過 25 個戰役任務將帶你前往許多最不可思議的世界。規劃緊密的戰略遊戲計畫，有大量的星球等你探索和防衛！
- 75+ 項特殊行動供你提升你的海洋行軍能力到巔峰水準。
- 10 大單位群組，共 24 支不同部隊。你甚至可以根據計劃要部署的任務和策略來組合後備部隊。
- 9 位各具強勁技能待你訓練的威猛英雄。幫助他們成為銀河系的佼佼者！
- 8 種特殊武器可助你在星際間揮灑軍隊戰術！設定你的遊戲計劃並利用彈跳器、毒氣炸彈甚至無人機工廠等即時武器帶來的優勢。
- 40 次升級以供提升你的戰略，並使用防禦無人機、凝固汽油彈火箭、彈跳爆破等增強你的各種單位。
- 超過 20 項成就，讓你證明你成為了一名多高明的即時戰略專家！

選擇您的難度模式以獲得最佳的即時戰略遊戲體驗：休閒、普通或老手。而且，如果你認為玩遍了整個銀河……還有不可能模式可供選擇，這僅適用於精英玩家，可離線使用！

在每日挑戰中證明自己並收集驚人的獎勵。

離線玩即時戰略遊戲：探索令人難以置信的世界，隨時隨地享受精彩的即時戰略體驗。

《Iron Marines Invasion》將在這款史詩即時戰略太空遠征中帶給你數小時豐富多采多姿的有趣遊戲，亦提供即時戰略單機遊戲。

關於此遊戲：
《地城謎蹤》是一款考驗玩家 2D 空間邏輯和技能運用的解謎遊戲，你可以用劍打倒身旁的怪物、用弓箭攻擊遠處的敵人、用盾牌推動障礙物、甚至可以用手套拉動怪物改變他的位置。

此遊戲總共有 150 個精心設計的關卡，玩家必須要充分了解遊戲的機制才能順利過關。

而若要達成進階目標，則需要針對解法進行最佳化，有的時候甚至要拋棄原本的解法，重新以不同角度去觀察和思考才能達成。

遊戲特色：
● 地城+解謎+倉庫番
● 150 個精心設計的關卡
● 地城氛圍的像素美術

mo.description:
"""你是否知道“Schadenfreude”是德语单词，意思是幸灾乐祸？这也是构建《邻居地狱归来》的主要思想。整个电视节目基于对你的脾气暴躁的邻居进行越来越残酷的恶作剧，以使观众开心，收视率高。在受2000年代早期邪恶电视启发的闹剧盛会中变坏很不错！ 

作为《邻居地狱归来》的睚眦必报的主角伍迪，你将穿越虚构但恰如其名的电视节目的第1季和第2季。一路上对讨厌的邻居进行恶作剧，一直到中国、印度、墨西哥，你将确保他的假期成为活生生的地狱。当你在进行恶作剧时，为什么只瞄准邻居呢？你可以让他的母亲和其他旅伴牵涉其中。无论你决定做什么，你值得信赖的摄制组都会在那里，并时刻关注所有行动。你可以让自己狂放的创造力自由驰骋，并观看邻居在绝望中愤怒。请注意不要被他或他的同伴抓住，否则他们会大声呼叫，并且你的电视节目将被停播。另一方面，如果你表现良好，则通过在邻居的生活中造成越来越多的混乱，收视率将会提高，你可能会赢得声名远播的奖项。 ""

邻居地狱归来1和2在一个包中进行重制：28个剧集，以邻居家中、邮轮上以及世界各地几个不同的度假地点为背景

- 在全高清中新渲染的所有图形
- 所有动画的帧率翻倍，带来更流畅的体验
- 使用隐身、技巧和风格进行完美的伏击
- 使用简单的界面和控件
- 精湛的卡通风格图形
- 大乐队配乐 


© HandyGames

mo.description:
在終極駕駛遊樂場中燃燒橡膠並撕碎金屬！

Wreckfest 充滿了升級和自定義選項。無論您是準備使用加固保險槓、防滾架、側面保護裝置等進行下一次拆遷德比，還是使用空氣濾清器、凸輪軸、燃油系統等發動機性能部件為您的汽車進行一場激烈的比賽，Wreckfest 正在成為最好的競技賽車遊戲。

• 獨特的賽車體驗 –只有通過逼真的物理模擬才能實現。見證在高速賽道上瘋狂的並駕齊驅，在充滿交叉路口和迎面而來的車輛的瘋狂賽道上面臨徹底的破壞瘋狂，或者在德比賽場上大獲全勝。

• 很棒的汽車—— 我們的汽車很舊，被撞壞了，被拼湊在一起......他們散發出風格和個性！從老美國重擊手到敏捷的歐洲人和有趣的亞洲人，你在其他遊戲中找不到這樣的東西。

• 有意義的定制 – 不僅可以改變汽車的外觀，還可以升級它們的防彈衣 – 用重鐵加固它們保護您免受損壞，但也會增加重量，這會影響汽車的操控性。修改您的汽車，以製造堅固的坦克或易碎但閃電般快速的火箭，或介於兩者之間的任何東西！

• 多人遊戲 - 在本地多人遊戲中破壞你的朋友，在追逐爆破優勢的同時將賽車推向極限！

• 挑戰模式 - 與農作物收割機、割草機、校車、三輪車等等一起玩得開心！

• 職業生涯模式 – 爭奪冠軍，賺取經驗，解鎖新的升級和車輛，並成為歷史上的 Wreckfest 冠軍！

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

mo.description:
《展翅翱翔》是一款屢獲殊榮的鳥類主題策略卡牌遊戲，也是一部鮮活的交互式鳥類百科，清新有趣，輕鬆愉快，適合1-5名玩家。作為鳥類發燒友，你的目標是發現和吸引更多的鳥兒加入你的自然保護區。

《展翅翱翔》（Wingspan）官方授權電子版改編，曾榮獲2019年德國年度桌面遊戲獎，權威桌遊網站BBG家庭類桌遊位列世界第一。

你們是一群鳥類發燒友——研究員、鳥類觀察家、鳥類學家和收藏家——你們一直在尋覓並試圖吸引那些最美麗的鳥類棲息到自己的野生動物保護區來。每一種鳥的加入都會讓你其中一塊棲息地上的鳥類組合變得更為豐富多彩。每一塊棲息地都各自專注於保護區生態搭建的某一重要方面。

本遊戲中，1-5名玩家在有限的回合內構建他們的自然保護區，並與其他玩家競爭。每當新的鳥類加入自然保護區，都會提升保護區在某個方面的能力，諸如鳥類產蛋、抽取新的鳥類卡牌或者收集食物。遊戲中包含170種獨特的鳥類，它們各自擁有對應它們在自然世界中所有的專長或者偏好的技能：例如，老鷹會捕獵，鵜鶘會捕魚，白鵝喜歡群居。

遊戲特色
* 輕鬆愉快的策略類卡牌遊戲，你的目標是發現和吸引最好的鳥兒。
* 同時支持單人和多人模式，最多可5名玩家組隊暢玩。
* 基於屢獲殊榮的引擎構築桌面遊戲，以卡牌為驅動，富有競爭樂趣。
* 數百隻獨特的鳥兒，配有動畫畫面和真實錄音。
* 用多種方式積攢分數，包括鳥兒、獎勵卡牌和回合目標。

mo.description:
【婚启 - 让每一份爱都有完美的开始】
婚启是一款专为备婚情侣设计的协同婚礼筹备管理工具，帮助你在一个 App 中，和伴侣一起，集中管理婚礼相关的任务、时间安排、回忆记录和预算信息。

【核心功能】
智能日历规划
• 首页展示婚礼倒计时，重要日期一目了然
• 任务与日历深度联动，筹备进度可视化
• 吉日智能推荐，帮您决策婚礼日期

任务管理系统
• 15大分类任务覆盖婚礼全流程：场地、餐饮、摄影、服饰...
• 根据婚礼日期自动排期，动态调整优先级
• 伴侣任务协同，双方进度实时同步

预算智能管控
• 分类预算设置，支出记录一键添加
• 支持定金、尾款分别记录
• 支出统计复盘，超预算智能预警

回忆时光轴
• 图片视频随心记录，备婚点滴长期保存
• 时间轴浏览模式,甜蜜瞬间时刻回顾
• 仅与伴侣分享，打造专属回忆录

【备婚工具包】
• 礼金簿：按亲友维度记录送出和收到的礼金，掌握收支情况
• 座位表：高效的婚礼宴会座位编排，支持座位表导出
• 亲友管理：礼金簿和座位表共享一套亲友名单，避免重复录入

【免费功能 vs 婚启会员】
免费用户可使用以下核心功能：
• 恋爱阶段 & 策划阶段备婚任务
• 基础预算管理（使用系统规划的预算分类）
• 回忆记录（图片/视频/文字，无数量限制）
• 日历与任务提醒
• 支出记录（最多6笔）、礼金记录（最多6笔）
• 亲友管理（最多10人）
• 座位表（最多2张桌）

升级婚启会员，解锁全部高级功能：
• 筹备阶段 & 确认阶段任务——完整覆盖婚前冲刺与最终确认的全部事项
• 无限支出记录 & 无限礼金记录
• 亲友管理人数无上限
• 座位表无桌数限制，无导出限制
• 自定义任务 & 自定义预算分类
（配对伴侣可共享会员权益）

会员方案：月度订阅 / 季度订阅 / 永久会员（一次性买断）

【订阅与自动续费说明】
• 订阅周期：1个月（月度会员），3个月（季度会员）
• 订阅价格：月度会员为每月9.9元；季度会员为每3个月19.9元

【为什么选择婚启】
• 专为中国备婚情侣设计 - 从选婚期、预算到四大金刚、酒店预定，备婚全流程任务指引
• 情侣协同 - 双方账户互联，任务分工清晰，共用一套预算

tw.description:
Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best.

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

tw.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

Yours forever.

tw.description:
發現並征服整個太空深處的無限世界。揭開一個充滿挑戰與威脅的故事，它將帶領你踏上一趟跨越銀河的非凡旅程。


在太空深處沒有什麼能長久不變，和平當然也不例外！
歡迎遊玩《Iron Marines: Invasion!》

暢玩刺激新世界中的獨特關卡任務和特殊行動，每個世界都有自己的特別地形、玩法、敵人和條件。學習如何一一擊敗他們！

在諸方英雄與各種單位的協助下指揮聯邦遍及整個銀河的部隊，他們將讓你的即時戰略遊戲技巧發揮到極限。

在有趣震撼的任務中與不尋常的敵人和兇猛的外星生物作戰。規劃你的戰略來保衛銀河系的和平！

獻給所有喜歡單機即時戰略遊戲和戰略遊戲的《Iron Marines》和科幻動作遊戲粉絲。藉由帶領自己的軍隊執行刺激驚奇的任務來實現你的戰術專家使命。

入侵已經近在眉睫！
率領銀河各地最勇猛的戰鬥部隊。與聯邦最強大的海軍陸戰隊並肩作戰！

現在你可以組合你的小隊並利用每個單位的獨特戰鬥技能：從騎兵到狙擊手、機甲、導彈發射器或可怕的外星戰士部落。
訓練出驚異的英雄及其各種實用能力：從提高軍隊士氣和火力到提高他們的耐力和射程，或者在敵人攻擊你之前就能夠感知。幫助他們加入戰鬥，維護各世界的和平！

成為銀河系最大謎團的專家！
使用遊戲內的百科全書來了解你要探索的世界或辨認你面對的敵人。利用可用的戰術資訊來配置您的戰略遊戲計劃。

瞧瞧這款即時戰略太空遠征遊戲的所有驚人特色：

- 一整個銀河等你探索。
- 超過 25 個戰役任務將帶你前往許多最不可思議的世界。規劃緊密的戰略遊戲計畫，有大量的星球等你探索和防衛！
- 75+ 項特殊行動供你提升你的海洋行軍能力到巔峰水準。
- 10 大單位群組，共 24 支不同部隊。你甚至可以根據計劃要部署的任務和策略來組合後備部隊。
- 9 位各具強勁技能待你訓練的威猛英雄。幫助他們成為銀河系的佼佼者！
- 8 種特殊武器可助你在星際間揮灑軍隊戰術！設定你的遊戲計劃並利用彈跳器、毒氣炸彈甚至無人機工廠等即時武器帶來的優勢。
- 40 次升級以供提升你的戰略，並使用防禦無人機、凝固汽油彈火箭、彈跳爆破等增強你的各種單位。
- 超過 20 項成就，讓你證明你成為了一名多高明的即時戰略專家！

選擇您的難度模式以獲得最佳的即時戰略遊戲體驗：休閒、普通或老手。而且，如果你認為玩遍了整個銀河……還有不可能模式可供選擇，這僅適用於精英玩家，可離線使用！

在每日挑戰中證明自己並收集驚人的獎勵。

離線玩即時戰略遊戲：探索令人難以置信的世界，隨時隨地享受精彩的即時戰略體驗。

《Iron Marines Invasion》將在這款史詩即時戰略太空遠征中帶給你數小時豐富多采多姿的有趣遊戲，亦提供即時戰略單機遊戲。

tw.description:
"""你是否知道“Schadenfreude”是德语单词，意思是幸灾乐祸？这也是构建《邻居地狱归来》的主要思想。整个电视节目基于对你的脾气暴躁的邻居进行越来越残酷的恶作剧，以使观众开心，收视率高。在受2000年代早期邪恶电视启发的闹剧盛会中变坏很不错！ 

作为《邻居地狱归来》的睚眦必报的主角伍迪，你将穿越虚构但恰如其名的电视节目的第1季和第2季。一路上对讨厌的邻居进行恶作剧，一直到中国、印度、墨西哥，你将确保他的假期成为活生生的地狱。当你在进行恶作剧时，为什么只瞄准邻居呢？你可以让他的母亲和其他旅伴牵涉其中。无论你决定做什么，你值得信赖的摄制组都会在那里，并时刻关注所有行动。你可以让自己狂放的创造力自由驰骋，并观看邻居在绝望中愤怒。请注意不要被他或他的同伴抓住，否则他们会大声呼叫，并且你的电视节目将被停播。另一方面，如果你表现良好，则通过在邻居的生活中造成越来越多的混乱，收视率将会提高，你可能会赢得声名远播的奖项。 ""

邻居地狱归来1和2在一个包中进行重制：28个剧集，以邻居家中、邮轮上以及世界各地几个不同的度假地点为背景

- 在全高清中新渲染的所有图形
- 所有动画的帧率翻倍，带来更流畅的体验
- 使用隐身、技巧和风格进行完美的伏击
- 使用简单的界面和控件
- 精湛的卡通风格图形
- 大乐队配乐 


© HandyGames

tw.description:
《展翅翱翔》是一款屢獲殊榮的鳥類主題策略卡牌遊戲，也是一部鮮活的交互式鳥類百科，清新有趣，輕鬆愉快，適合1-5名玩家。作為鳥類發燒友，你的目標是發現和吸引更多的鳥兒加入你的自然保護區。

《展翅翱翔》（Wingspan）官方授權電子版改編，曾榮獲2019年德國年度桌面遊戲獎，權威桌遊網站BBG家庭類桌遊位列世界第一。

你們是一群鳥類發燒友——研究員、鳥類觀察家、鳥類學家和收藏家——你們一直在尋覓並試圖吸引那些最美麗的鳥類棲息到自己的野生動物保護區來。每一種鳥的加入都會讓你其中一塊棲息地上的鳥類組合變得更為豐富多彩。每一塊棲息地都各自專注於保護區生態搭建的某一重要方面。

本遊戲中，1-5名玩家在有限的回合內構建他們的自然保護區，並與其他玩家競爭。每當新的鳥類加入自然保護區，都會提升保護區在某個方面的能力，諸如鳥類產蛋、抽取新的鳥類卡牌或者收集食物。遊戲中包含170種獨特的鳥類，它們各自擁有對應它們在自然世界中所有的專長或者偏好的技能：例如，老鷹會捕獵，鵜鶘會捕魚，白鵝喜歡群居。

遊戲特色
* 輕鬆愉快的策略類卡牌遊戲，你的目標是發現和吸引最好的鳥兒。
* 同時支持單人和多人模式，最多可5名玩家組隊暢玩。
* 基於屢獲殊榮的引擎構築桌面遊戲，以卡牌為驅動，富有競爭樂趣。
* 數百隻獨特的鳥兒，配有動畫畫面和真實錄音。
* 用多種方式積攢分數，包括鳥兒、獎勵卡牌和回合目標。

tw.description:
在終極駕駛遊樂場中燃燒橡膠並撕碎金屬！

Wreckfest 充滿了升級和自定義選項。無論您是準備使用加固保險槓、防滾架、側面保護裝置等進行下一次拆遷德比，還是使用空氣濾清器、凸輪軸、燃油系統等發動機性能部件為您的汽車進行一場激烈的比賽，Wreckfest 正在成為最好的競技賽車遊戲。

• 獨特的賽車體驗 –只有通過逼真的物理模擬才能實現。見證在高速賽道上瘋狂的並駕齊驅，在充滿交叉路口和迎面而來的車輛的瘋狂賽道上面臨徹底的破壞瘋狂，或者在德比賽場上大獲全勝。

• 很棒的汽車—— 我們的汽車很舊，被撞壞了，被拼湊在一起......他們散發出風格和個性！從老美國重擊手到敏捷的歐洲人和有趣的亞洲人，你在其他遊戲中找不到這樣的東西。

• 有意義的定制 – 不僅可以改變汽車的外觀，還可以升級它們的防彈衣 – 用重鐵加固它們保護您免受損壞，但也會增加重量，這會影響汽車的操控性。修改您的汽車，以製造堅固的坦克或易碎但閃電般快速的火箭，或介於兩者之間的任何東西！

• 多人遊戲 - 在本地多人遊戲中破壞你的朋友，在追逐爆破優勢的同時將賽車推向極限！

• 挑戰模式 - 與農作物收割機、割草機、校車、三輪車等等一起玩得開心！

• 職業生涯模式 – 爭奪冠軍，賺取經驗，解鎖新的升級和車輛，並成為歷史上的 Wreckfest 冠軍！

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

【婚启 - 让每一份爱都有完美的开始】
婚启是一款专为备婚情侣设计的协同婚礼筹备管理工具，帮助你在一个 App 中，和伴侣一起，集中管理婚礼相关的任务、时间安排、回忆记录和预算信息。

【核心功能】
智能日历规划
• 首页展示婚礼倒计时，重要日期一目了然
• 任务与日历深度联动，筹备进度可视化
• 吉日智能推荐，帮您决策婚礼日期

任务管理系统
• 15大分类任务覆盖婚礼全流程：场地、餐饮、摄影、服饰...
• 根据婚礼日期自动排期，动态调整优先级
• 伴侣任务协同，双方进度实时同步

预算智能管控
• 分类预算设置，支出记录一键添加
• 支持定金、尾款分别记录
• 支出统计复盘，超预算智能预警

回忆时光轴
• 图片视频随心记录，备婚点滴长期保存
• 时间轴浏览模式,甜蜜瞬间时刻回顾
• 仅与伴侣分享，打造专属回忆录

【备婚工具包】
• 礼金簿：按亲友维度记录送出和收到的礼金，掌握收支情况
• 座位表：高效的婚礼宴会座位编排，支持座位表导出
• 亲友管理：礼金簿和座位表共享一套亲友名单，避免重复录入

【免费功能 vs 婚启会员】
免费用户可使用以下核心功能：
• 恋爱阶段 & 策划阶段备婚任务
• 基础预算管理（使用系统规划的预算分类）
• 回忆记录（图片/视频/文字，无数量限制）
• 日历与任务提醒
• 支出记录（最多6笔）、礼金记录（最多6笔）
• 亲友管理（最多10人）
• 座位表（最多2张桌）

升级婚启会员，解锁全部高级功能：
• 筹备阶段 & 确认阶段任务——完整覆盖婚前冲刺与最终确认的全部事项
• 无限支出记录 & 无限礼金记录
• 亲友管理人数无上限
• 座位表无桌数限制，无导出限制
• 自定义任务 & 自定义预算分类
（配对伴侣可共享会员权益）

会员方案：月度订阅 / 季度订阅 / 永久会员（一次性买断）

【订阅与自动续费说明】
• 订阅周期：1个月（月度会员），3个月（季度会员）
• 订阅价格：月度会员为每月9.9元；季度会员为每3个月19.9元
• 付款：通过用户的iTunes账户扣款，用户确认购买后即付款。
• 取消续订：如需取消续订，请在当前订阅周期到期前24小时以前，手动在iTunes/Apple ID设置管理中关闭自动续订功能。在当前订阅周期内，仍可继续使用会员功能。
• 续订：苹果iTunes账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后订阅周期顺延一个订阅周期。

us.description:
Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best.

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.

頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.

歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁.

如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比.
輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進.
退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.

us.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

us.description:
"Did you know that “Schadenfreude” is a German word defined as the concept of finding joy in someone else’s misfortune? It is also the main idea on which Neighbours back From Hell is built. A whole TV show based on playing increasingly outrageous pranks on your grumpy neighbor to keep the audience entertained, and viewership numbers high. It’s good to be bad in this early 2000s trash TV-inspired slapstick extravaganza! 

As Woody, the vengeful star protagonist of Neighbours back From Hell, you will prank your way through Seasons 1 and 2 of the fictitious, but aptly named TV show. Take the mischief from your nasty neighbor’s flat all the way to China, India, and Mexico where you will make sure his holiday is a living hell. While you’re at it, why limit targeting your antics at your neighbor, when you can involve his mother and fellow travelers? Whatever you decide to do, your trusty camera crew will be right there and keep a keen eye on all the action. You can let your crooked creativity flow freely and watch the neighbor rage in desperation. Just be mindful not to get caught by him or his companions, or they will whoop you good and your TV show will be taken off the air. If you perform well on the other hand, by creating more and more disarray and chaos in the neighbor’s life, ratings will increase, and you could win prestigious awards. "

Neighbours From Hell 1 & 2 Remastered in one package: 28 episodes set in the neighbor’s home, on a cruise liner, and in several different holiday locations around the world 

- All graphics newly rendered in Full HD 
- Framerate of all animations doubled for a smoother experience  
- Use stealth, skill, and style to perform the perfect ambush 
- Easy to use interface and controls 
- Superb cartoon-style graphics 
- Big band soundtrack 
- Game Center support
- Full controller support

Wingspan is a relaxing, award-winning strategy card game about birds for 1 to 5 players. Each bird you play extends a chain of powerful combinations in one of your three habitats. Your goal is to discover and attract the best birds to your network of wildlife preserves. 

You are bird enthusiasts—researchers, bird watchers, ornithologists, and collectors—seeking to discover and attract the best birds to your network of wildlife preserves. Each bird extends a chain of powerful combinations in one of your habitats. Each habitat focuses on a key aspect of the growth of your preserves.

In Wingspan up to 5 players compete to build up their nature preserves in a limited number of turns. Each beautiful bird that you add to your preserve makes you better at laying eggs, drawing cards, or gathering food. Many of the 170 unique birds have powers that echo real life: your hawks will hunt, your pelicans will fish, and your geese will form a flock.

Features
- Relaxing strategy card game where your goal is to discover and attract the best birds.
- Single player and multiplayer modes for up to five players.
- Based on award winning, competitive, card-driven, engine-building board game.
- Hundreds of unique, animated birds with their real life sound recordings.
- Multiple ways to accumulate points with birds, bonus cards and end-of-round goals.

tr.description:
With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs.

This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy.

Main Features:
- Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls.
- Set number of retries and time intervals.
- Schedule calls in advance via calendar.
- Add extensions automatically after dialing.
- Enable vibration before each redial.
- Call history and retry stats.

Perfect for:
- Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.)
- Customer service or tech support
- Calling public offices
- Freelancers and business owners following up clients

Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration.

tr.description:
Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best.

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

tr.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

tr.description:
Discover and conquer countless worlds across deep space. Unravel a story full of challenges and threats that will lead you across the galaxy on an extraordinary voyage. 
Nothing lasts long in deep space, and peace is not an exception!

Welcome to Iron Marines: Invasion!

Enjoy unique stage missions and special operations in exciting new worlds, each one with its own particular terrain, style, enemies, and conditions. Learn how to beat them one by one!
Command the Federation’s troops across the galaxy, with the aid of Heroes & Units that will allow you to boost your RTS game skills to the limit.


Battle extraordinary enemies and ferocious alien creatures in fun and electrifying missions. Plan your strategy to defend the peace in the galaxy!
For all Iron Marines & SciFi action fans who get the kicks of offline RTS games and strategy games. Become the tactical specialist you’re meant to be by leading your own army in thrilling, mind-blowing missions.

The invasion is at our gates!

Lead the fiercest combat corps across the galaxy. Fight side by side with the Federation’s toughest Marines!
Now you can combine your squad and take advantage of each Unit’s unique fighting skills: from ranger to snipers, mechas, missile launchers, or fearsome alien warrior clans.
Train jaw-dropping heroes and their useful abilities: from boosting up your army’s morale and firepower to increase their stamina and reach, or detecting upcoming enemies before they attack you. Help them join the fight to keep peace among the worlds!

Become an expert on the galaxy’s biggest mysteries!
Use an in-game Encyclopedia to understand the worlds you explore or identify the enemies you face. Take advantage of the tactical info available to configure your strategic game plan.


Check all the amazing features of this real-time strategy space odyssey:
- An entire galaxy to be discovered.
- 25+ campaign missions that will take you to the most incredible worlds. Tons of planets for you to explore and defend by planning a tight strategic game plan!
- 75+ special operations for you to upgrade your Marine abilities to the peak level.
- 10 Unit groups for a total of 24 different troops. You can even combine your backup depending on the mission and strategy you’re planning to deploy.
- 9 powerful heroes with strong skills for you to train. Help them become the Galaxy’s finest!
- 8 Special Weapons to boost your army tactics to the stars! Set your game plan and take advantage of instant weapons like bouncers, toxic bombs, or even drone factories.
- 40 Upgrades to improve your strategy and empower your units with defense drones, napalm rockets, ricocheting blasts and much more.
- 20+ Achievements to show how much of a real-time strategy expert you’ve become!
- Choose your difficulty mode for the best RTS games experience: Casual, Normal, or Veteran. And if you think you’ve seen it all across the galaxy… the impossible mode - only for the elite players, available offline!
- Prove yourself in daily challenges and collect amazing rewards.
- Play rts games offline: Enjoy the awesome real-time strategy experience anywhere, as you explore incredible worlds.

Iron Marines Invasion will give you hours of colorful, fun gameplay in this epic real-time strategy space odyssey, available to play offline.

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move.

Features:
● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban
● 150 handcrafted rooms
● Fantasy themed pixel art
● Non-linear dungeon map

tr.description:
"Did you know that “Schadenfreude” is a German word defined as the concept of finding joy in someone else’s misfortune? It is also the main idea on which Neighbours back From Hell is built. A whole TV show based on playing increasingly outrageous pranks on your grumpy neighbor to keep the audience entertained, and viewership numbers high. It’s good to be bad in this early 2000s trash TV-inspired slapstick extravaganza! 

As Woody, the vengeful star protagonist of Neighbours back From Hell, you will prank your way through Seasons 1 and 2 of the fictitious, but aptly named TV show. Take the mischief from your nasty neighbor’s flat all the way to China, India, and Mexico where you will make sure his holiday is a living hell. While you’re at it, why limit targeting your antics at your neighbor, when you can involve his mother and fellow travelers? Whatever you decide to do, your trusty camera crew will be right there and keep a keen eye on all the action. You can let your crooked creativity flow freely and watch the neighbor rage in desperation. Just be mindful not to get caught by him or his companions, or they will whoop you good and your TV show will be taken off the air. If you perform well on the other hand, by creating more and more disarray and chaos in the neighbor’s life, ratings will increase, and you could win prestigious awards. "

Neighbours From Hell 1 & 2 Remastered in one package: 28 episodes set in the neighbor’s home, on a cruise liner, and in several different holiday locations around the world 

- All graphics newly rendered in Full HD 
- Framerate of all animations doubled for a smoother experience  
- Use stealth, skill, and style to perform the perfect ambush 
- Easy to use interface and controls 
- Superb cartoon-style graphics 
- Big band soundtrack 
- Game Center support
- Full controller support

© HandyGames

tr.description:
Wingspan is a relaxing, award-winning strategy card game about birds for 1 to 5 players. Each bird you play extends a chain of powerful combinations in one of your three habitats. Your goal is to discover and attract the best birds to your network of wildlife preserves. 

You are bird enthusiasts—researchers, bird watchers, ornithologists, and collectors—seeking to discover and attract the best birds to your network of wildlife preserves. Each bird extends a chain of powerful combinations in one of your habitats. Each habitat focuses on a key aspect of the growth of your preserves.

In Wingspan up to 5 players compete to build up their nature preserves in a limited number of turns. Each beautiful bird that you add to your preserve makes you better at laying eggs, drawing cards, or gathering food. Many of the 170 unique birds have powers that echo real life: your hawks will hunt, your pelicans will fish, and your geese will form a flock.

Features
- Relaxing strategy card game where your goal is to discover and attract the best birds.
- Single player and multiplayer modes for up to five players.
- Based on award winning, competitive, card-driven, engine-building board game.
- Hundreds of unique, animated birds with their real life sound recordings.
- Multiple ways to accumulate points with birds, bonus cards and end-of-round goals.

tr.description:
Burn rubber and shred metal in the ultimate driving playground!

Wreckfest is jam-packed with upgrade and customization options. Whether you are preparing for your next demolition derby with reinforced bumpers, roll cages, side protectors and much more, or setting your car up for a banger race with engine performance parts like air filters, camshafts, fuel systems, etc., Wreckfest is shaping up to be the best combative motorsport game out there. 

• Unique Racing Experience – Exhilarating no-rules racing action with defining, once-in-a-lifetime moments that can be achieved only with a true-to-life physics simulation. Witness insane neck-to-neck fighting on high-speed circuits, face total destruction madness on crazy courses with intersections and oncoming traffic, or go for demolition dominance in derby arenas.

• Awesome Cars – Our cars are old, banged up, patched together... They ooze style and character! From old American heavy-hitters to agile Europeans and fun Asians, you won’t find anything like this in other games. 

• Meaningful Customization – Change not only the look of your cars but also upgrade their body armor – Reinforce them with heavy iron that protects you from damage, but also adds weight, which impacts the cars handling. Modify your car to make a robust tank or a fragile but lightning-fast rocket, or anything in between!

• Multiplayer – Wreck your friends in local multiplayer and take racing to the limit while chasing for demolition dominance!

• Challenge modes – Have hilarious fun with crop harvesters, lawn mowers, school buses, three-wheelers and much more! 

• Career Mode – Battle for championships, earn experience, unlock new upgrades and cars, and become the all-time Wreckfest champion!

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

tr.description:
【婚启 - 让每一份爱都有完美的开始】
婚启是一款专为备婚情侣设计的协同婚礼筹备管理工具，帮助你在一个 App 中，和伴侣一起，集中管理婚礼相关的任务、时间安排、回忆记录和预算信息。

【核心功能】
智能日历规划
• 首页展示婚礼倒计时，重要日期一目了然
• 任务与日历深度联动，筹备进度可视化
• 吉日智能推荐，帮您决策婚礼日期

任务管理系统
• 15大分类任务覆盖婚礼全流程：场地、餐饮、摄影、服饰...
• 根据婚礼日期自动排期，动态调整优先级
• 伴侣任务协同，双方进度实时同步

预算智能管控
• 分类预算设置，支出记录一键添加
• 支持定金、尾款分别记录
• 支出统计复盘，超预算智能预警

回忆时光轴
• 图片视频随心记录，备婚点滴长期保存
• 时间轴浏览模式,甜蜜瞬间时刻回顾
• 仅与伴侣分享，打造专属回忆录

【备婚工具包】
• 礼金簿：按亲友维度记录送出和收到的礼金，掌握收支情况
• 座位表：高效的婚礼宴会座位编排，支持座位表导出
• 亲友管理：礼金簿和座位表共享一套亲友名单，避免重复录入

【免费功能 vs 婚启会员】
免费用户可使用以下核心功能：
• 恋爱阶段 & 策划阶段备婚任务
• 基础预算管理（使用系统规划的预算分类）
• 回忆记录（图片/视频/文字，无数量限制）
• 日历与任务提醒
• 支出记录（最多6笔）、礼金记录（最多6笔）
• 亲友管理（最多10人）
• 座位表（最多2张桌）

升级婚启会员，解锁全部高级功能：
• 筹备阶段 & 确认阶段任务——完整覆盖婚前冲刺与最终确认的全部事项
• 无限支出记录 & 无限礼金记录
• 亲友管理人数无上限
• 座位表无桌数限制，无导出限制
• 自定义任务 & 自定义预算分类
（配对伴侣可共享会员权益）

会员方案：月度订阅 / 季度订阅 / 永久会员（一次性买断）

【订阅与自动续费说明】
• 订阅周期：1个月（月度会员），3个月（季度会员）
• 订阅价格：月度会员为每月9.9元；季度会员为每3个月19.9元

• 续订：苹果iTunes账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后订阅周期顺延一个订阅周期。
• Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

【为什么选择婚启】
• 专为中国备婚情侣设计 - 从选婚期、预算到四大金刚、酒店预定，备婚全流程任务指引

pt.description:
Com esta aplicação, pode fazer chamadas automáticas para os números que desejar de forma eficiente e personalizada. Pode definir o número de repetições, o intervalo entre chamadas, adicionar um posto, ativar a vibração antes de marcar e até mesmo agendar as suas chamadas utilizando um calendário integrado. A Auto Redial App oferece ainda uma interface simples e intuitiva, um histórico de chamadas detalhado e várias opções de personalização para se adequar às suas necessidades.

Esta aplicação é ideal para quem precisa de fazer chamadas repetitivas automaticamente — como uma chamada para uma consulta, uma nova tentativa de chamada quando o número está ocupado ou contactar serviços onde a linha está ocupada.

Principais características:
- Redisque automaticamente as chamadas ocupadas ou não atendidas.
- Defina o número de tentativas e os intervalos de tempo.
- Agende chamadas com antecedência via calendário.
- Adicione os ramais automaticamente após a marcação.
- Ative a vibração antes de cada rediscagem.
- Histórico de chamadas e estatísticas de novas tentativas.

Perfeito para:
- Marcação de consultas (médicas, embaixadas, etc.)
- Atendimento ao cliente ou suporte técnico
- Telefonar para repartições públicas
- Freelancers e empresários a acompanhar clientes

Quer esteja a ligar para marcar uma consulta médica, falar com o serviço de apoio ao cliente ou apenas a tentar ligar-se quando a linha está ocupada, esta aplicação poupa tempo e frustração.

pt.description:
Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best.

ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE.
Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged.

FOR EVERY MUSICIAN.
Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads.

DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE.
AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space.

CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY.
AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there).


Highlighted Features:
- A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design.
- Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting).
- Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions).
- The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. 
- Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live.
- Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase.
- Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral.
- Concert pitch adjustment.


How to Use:
01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement.
02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes.
03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration.

Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.

pt.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

Descubra e conquiste incontáveis ​​mundos no espaço profundo. Desvende uma história cheia de desafios e ameaças que o levarão pela galáxia em uma viagem extraordinária. 

Nada dura muito no espaço profundo, e a paz não é uma exceção!
Bem-vindo ao Iron Marines Invasion!

Aproveite missões de fase única e operações especiais em novos mundos emocionantes, cada um com seu próprio terreno, estilo, inimigos e condições particulares. Saiba como vencê-los um por um!

Comande as tropas da Federação em toda a galáxia, com a ajuda de Heróis e Unidades que levarão suas habilidades em RTS ao limite.

Lute contra inimigos extraordinários e criaturas alienígenas ferozes em missões divertidas e eletrizantes. Planeje sua estratégia para defender a paz na galáxia!

Para todos os fãs de ação de Iron Marines e SciFi que gostam de jogos RTS e estratégia geral offline. Torne-se um especialista tático, liderando seu próprio exército em missões emocionantes e alucinantes.

A invasão é iminente!
Lidere o corpo de combate mais feroz da galáxia. Lute lado a lado com os fuzileiros navais mais durões da Federação!

Agora você pode combinar seu esquadrão e aproveitar as habilidades de luta únicas de cada unidade: de guardas a franco-atiradores, mechas, lançadores de mísseis ou temíveis clãs de guerreiros alienígenas.

Treine heróis de cair o queixo e suas habilidades úteis: desde aumentar a moral e o poder de fogo do seu exército até aumentar sua resistência e alcance, ou detectar inimigos próximos antes que eles ataquem você. Ajude-os a entrar na luta para manter a paz entre os mundos!

Torne-se um especialista nos maiores mistérios da galáxia!
Use uma enciclopédia de jogo para entender os mundos que você explora ou identificar os inimigos que você enfrenta. Aproveite as informações táticas disponíveis para configurar seu plano de jogo estratégico.

Confira todos os recursos incríveis desta odisseia espacial de estratégia em tempo real:
- Uma galáxia inteira a ser descoberta.
- Mais de 25 missões de campanha que o levarão aos mundos mais incríveis. Toneladas de planetas para você explorar e defender com um plano de jogo estratégico elaborado!
- 75+ operações especiais para você atualizar suas habilidades de fuzileiros ao nível máximo.
- 10 grupos de unidades chegando a um total de 24 tropas diferentes. Você pode até combinar seus reforços dependendo da missão e estratégia que planeja mobilizar.
- 9 heróis poderosos com grandes habilidades para você treinar. Ajude-os a se tornarem os melhores da galáxia!
- 8 armas especiais para impulsionar suas táticas do exército até as estrelas! Defina seu plano de jogo e aproveite as armas instantâneas, como tribombas, bombas tóxicas ou até fábricas de drones.
- 40 atualizações para melhorar sua estratégia e capacitar suas unidades com drones de defesa, foguetes de napalm, explosões de ricochete e muito mais.
- Mais de 20 conquistas para mostrar o quanto você se tornou um especialista em estratégia em tempo real!

Escolha o seu modo de dificuldade para ter a melhor experiência de jogos RTS: casual, normal ou veterano. E para quem acha que já viu de tudo nesta galáxia... o modo impossível - apenas para os jogadores de elite, disponível offline!

Teste suas habilidades em desafios diários e colete recompensas incríveis.
Jogue RTS offline: aproveite a incrível experiência de estratégia em tempo real em qualquer lugar, enquanto explora mundos incríveis.
Iron Marines Invasion oferece horas de jogabilidade colorida e divertida nesta odisseia espacial épica de estratégia em tempo real, disponível para jogar RTS offline.

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move.

● 150 handcrafted rooms

pt.description:
"""Você sabia que “Schadenfreude” é uma palavra alemã para definir o conceito de encontrar alegria no infortúnio de outra pessoa? É também a ideia principal do jogo Vizinhos do Inferno. Um programa de TV baseado em pegadinhas cada vez mais ultrajantes contra seu vizinho mal-humorado. Tudo para manter o público entretido e o número de visualizações alto. Ser mau é algo bom nessa extravagância de palhaçada inspirada na TV do início dos anos 2000! 

Como o Woody, o protagonista vingativo do Vizinhos do Inferno, você vai fazer pegadinhas através das temporadas 1 e 2 do fictício, mas apropriadamente chamado programa de TV. Faça travessuras do apartamento do seu vizinho desagradável até a China, Índia e México, onde você garantirá que as férias dele sejam um inferno. Já que você está dedicado em fazer isso, por que limitar suas travessuras em um vizinho, quando você pode envolver a mãe dele e outros viajantes? Não importa o que você deseja fazer, sua confiável equipe de filmagem estará lá, pronta para toda a ação. Você pode deixar sua criatividade fluir livremente e ver o vizinho se enfurecer em desespero. Apenas tome cuidado para não ser pego por ele ou seus companheiros. Se isso acontecer, eles vão gritar com você e seu programa de TV será tirado do ar. Por outro lado, se você tiver um bom desempenho, criando mais desordem e caos na vida do vizinho, as avaliações irão aumentar e você poderá ganhar prêmios de prestígio. ""

O Vizinhos do Inferno 1 e 2 remasterizado em um pacote: 28 episódios ambientados na casa do vizinho, em um cruzeiro e em vários locais de férias ao redor do mundo

- Todos os gráficos recém-renderizados em Full HD
- Para uma experiência mais suave, as taxas de quadros de todas as animações foram dobradas
- Use a discrição, habilidade e estilo para realizar uma emboscada perfeita
- Interface e controles fáceis de usar
- Excelentes gráficos em estilo de desenho animado
- Trilha sonora de uma grande banda 
- Suporte total ao controlador
- Compatível com Game Center!

© HandyGames

pt.description:
Wingspan é um premiado jogo de cartas de estratégia relaxante sobre pássaros para 1 a 5 jogadores. Cada pássaro que você joga estende uma cadeia de combinações poderosas em um de seus três habitats.

A adaptação digital oficialmente licenciada de Wingspan, vencedora do prestigioso prêmio de jogo de tabuleiro Kennerspiel des Jahres 2019.

Vocês são entusiastas de pássaros — pesquisadores, observadores de pássaros, ornitólogos e colecionadores — procurando descobrir e atrair os melhores pássaros para sua rede de reservas de vida selvagem. Cada pássaro expande uma cadeia de combinações poderosas em um de seus habitats. Cada habitat se concentra em um aspecto fundamental do crescimento de suas reservas.

Em Wingspan, até 5 jogadores competem para construir suas reservas naturais em um número limitado de turnos. Cada pássaro lindo que você adiciona à sua reserva melhora sua capacidade de colocar ovos, tirar cartas ou colher alimentos. Muitos dos 170 pássaros únicos têm poderes que refletem na vida real: seus falcões caçam, seus pelicanos pescam e seus gansos formam um bando.

Características
- Jogo de cartas de estratégia relaxante, onde seu objetivo é descobrir e atrair os melhores pássaros.
- Modos solo e multijogador para até cinco jogadores.
- Com base no premiado e competitivo jogo de tabuleiro baseado em cartas e construção motores.
- Centenas de pássaros animados e únicos, com gravações de seus cantos reais.
- Diversas maneiras de acumular pontos com pássaros, cartas de bônus e objetivos de final de rodada.

pt.description:
Queime borracha e destrua metal no maior circuito de corrida livre que há!

Wreckfest possui uma paulada de opções de melhorias e personalizações. Você pode se preparar para a próxima corrida de demolição com para-choques reforçados, santantônios, protetores laterais e muito mais, ou pode preparar o carro para uma Corrida Lata Velha com peças de desempenho de motor como filtros de ar, árvores de cames, sistemas de combustível etc. Wreckfest está se tornando o melhor jogo de combate motorizado que existe. 

• Experiência de Corrida Única - Corridas de ação sem regras e de tirar o fôlego, com momentos únicos possíveis apenas graças à simulação física realista. Participe de batalhas em circuitos de alta velocidade, enfrente a possibilidade de destruição total em rotas malucas com intersecções e tráfego ou parta para a dominação nas arenas de destruição.

• Carros Incríveis - Nossos carros são velhos, acabados e remendados, mas cheios de estilo! Dos velhos guerreiros americanos aos ágeis europeus, passando pelos asiáticos divertidos! Não tem nada como isso em outros jogos. 

• Personalização Relevante - Altere não só a aparência do carro, mas também a blindagem. Reforce-os com placas de ferro pesadas que protegem contra dano, mas aumentam o peso, impactando o controle. Modifique o carro para que se torne um tanque robusto, um foguete frágil e veloz ou qualquer coisa entre esses extremos!

• Multijogador - Destrua seus amigos no modo multijogador local e corra no limite enquanto os persegue para dominar na demolição!

• Modos Desafiadores - Divirta-se com colheitadeiras, cortadores de grama, ônibus escolares, triciclos e muito mais! 

• Modo Carreira - Batalhe em campeonatos, ganhe experiência, desbloqueie novas melhorias e carros e torne-se o campeão máximo de Wreckfest!

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

pt.description:
Prepare-se para entrar em ação e mostrar ao Reino quem é o verdadeiro chefe no melhor jogo de defesa de torres!

Enfrente impérios de poderosos inimigos. Ataque os chefes supremos, desbloqueando e mudando para novas torres. Treine heróis lendários e conquiste usando sua estratégia neste incrível jogo tower defense.

O Kingdom Rush Vengeance lhe dará horas e horas de partidas do melhor jogo de defesa de torres disponível! E o melhor, jogos sem net, jogue mesmo sem internet!

Heróis, seu Exército, Inimigos e lendárias tower defense lutas de chefe!
- 17 Poderosos HERÓIS que acatam as suas ordens sem hesitar
- Evolua seus heróis e melhore suas habilidades
- 10+ PEÇAS E ARTEFATOS para aquela ação extra na batalha na defesa de torres.
- NOVOS PODERES E ARMADURAS para vencer seus inimigos, estilo defesa de torres!
- 30 UPGRADES para treinar seu exército da sua maneira.
- 60+ INIMIGOS MORTAIS que colocarão à prova toda a sua inteligência e habilidades estratégicas
- CORRA PARA SALVAR O REINO ao combater 6 poderosos chefes nas batalhas contra chefe mais lendárias!

Seleção Épica de Torres e Upgrades
- 22 NOVAS TORRES para defender seu reino
- HABILIDADES ÚNICAS E PODERES ESPECIAIS para cada torre
- Escolha seu arsenal de torres e execute sua estratégia. 

Crie combinações devastadoras de torres, habilidades e poderes especiais para deter seus inimigos!

Jogo de Defesa de Torres Quase Sem Fim

- 42 ETAPAS DE DESAFIO que testarão suas habilidades
- 9 REINOS DIFERENTES para conquistar e explorar no estilo tower defense
- 60+ CONQUISTAS, segredos escondidos e coisas divertidas para você brincar e descobrir enquanto explora o reino!
- DESAFIOS HERÓICOS E DE FERRO em todas as fases
- CASUAL, NORMAL, VETERANO OU IMPOSSÍVEL dificuldade para todos os níveis
- Convocar ondas inimigas mais rapidamente para ganhar ouro extra

Jogos Sem Net Incríveis de Defesa de Torre

Sem Wi-Fi em sua Dark Tower?

- JOGOS SEM NET - jogue offline, quando não tiver wifi
- JOGO OFFLINE - acesse mesmo sem conexão à internet
- Você pode escolher jogar o Kingdom Rush Vengeance como seu jogo Tower Defence offline.

pt.description:
【婚启 - 让每一份爱都有完美的开始】
婚启是一款专为备婚情侣设计的协同婚礼筹备管理工具，帮助你在一个 App 中，和伴侣一起，集中管理婚礼相关的任务、时间安排、回忆记录和预算信息。

【核心功能】
智能日历规划
• 首页展示婚礼倒计时，重要日期一目了然
• 任务与日历深度联动，筹备进度可视化
• 吉日智能推荐，帮您决策婚礼日期

任务管理系统
• 15大分类任务覆盖婚礼全流程：场地、餐饮、摄影、服饰...
• 根据婚礼日期自动排期，动态调整优先级
• 伴侣任务协同，双方进度实时同步

预算智能管控
• 分类预算设置，支出记录一键添加
• 支持定金、尾款分别记录
• 支出统计复盘，超预算智能预警

回忆时光轴
• 图片视频随心记录，备婚点滴长期保存
• 时间轴浏览模式,甜蜜瞬间时刻回顾
• 仅与伴侣分享，打造专属回忆录

【备婚工具包】
• 礼金簿：按亲友维度记录送出和收到的礼金，掌握收支情况
• 座位表：高效的婚礼宴会座位编排，支持座位表导出
• 亲友管理：礼金簿和座位表共享一套亲友名单，避免重复录入

【免费功能 vs 婚启会员】
免费用户可使用以下核心功能：
• 恋爱阶段 & 策划阶段备婚任务
• 基础预算管理（使用系统规划的预算分类）
• 回忆记录（图片/视频/文字，无数量限制）
• 日历与任务提醒
• 支出记录（最多6笔）、礼金记录（最多6笔）
• 亲友管理（最多10人）
• 座位表（最多2张桌）

升级婚启会员，解锁全部高级功能：
• 筹备阶段 & 确认阶段任务——完整覆盖婚前冲刺与最终确认的全部事项
• 无限支出记录 & 无限礼金记录
• 亲友管理人数无上限
• 座位表无桌数限制，无导出限制
• 自定义任务 & 自定义预算分类
（配对伴侣可共享会员权益）

会员方案：月度订阅 / 季度订阅 / 永久会员（一次性买断）

【订阅与自动续费说明】
• 订阅周期：1个月（月度会员），3个月（季度会员）
• 订阅价格：月度会员为每月9.9元；季度会员为每3个月19.9元
• 付款：通过用户的iTunes账户扣款，用户确认购买后即付款。
• 取消续订：如需取消续订，请在当前订阅周期到期前24小时以前，手动在iTunes/Apple ID设置管理中关闭自动续订功能。在当前订阅周期内，仍可继续使用会员功能。
• 续订：苹果iTunes账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后订阅周期顺延一个订阅周期。
• Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
• 隐私协议：https://www.feilinggu.com/wp/legal/privacy_policy.html

【为什么选择婚启】
• 专为中国备婚情侣设计 - 从选婚期、预算到四大金刚、酒店预定，备婚全流程任务指引
• 情侣协同 - 双方账户互联，任务分工清晰，共用一套预算
• 数据可视化 - 进度、预算、时间线，所有信息一目了然
• 隐私安全 - 只为两个人设计，所有数据不公开、不分享

从相遇到相伴，从求婚到婚礼，愿每一份爱都有完美的开始


—— 婚启团队
期待与你一起启程
